purpose: QA-driven RealVisXL follow-up profile focused on reducing clasped-hand ambiguity by using separated visible hands, readable fingers, and clear contact points.

request_patch_values.positive_prompt: hyperrealistic editorial portrait of an adult subject seated at a simple wooden table, both hands separated and fully visible resting naturally on the tabletop, ten readable fingers with natural spacing, accurate knuckles, fingernails, wrists, and palm planes, no clasped hands, no interlocked fingers, believable skin folds at finger joints, textured tailored jacket sleeves ending above the wrists, fabric weave and subtle cloth folds, clear contact shadows where fingertips touch the table, natural facial asymmetry, lifelike eyes, realistic skin pores, soft studio window lighting, realistic shadows, 70mm portrait lens, photographic color grading
request_patch_values.negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, illustration, CGI, doll-like face, plastic skin, waxy skin, over-smoothed texture, clasped hands, interlocked fingers, folded hands, deformed hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused fingers, webbed fingers, duplicated thumb, broken wrist, twisted wrist, distorted nails, melted fingertips, warped sleeves, cloth melting into skin, bad anatomy, crossed eyes, low resolution, blurry, watermark, text, logo

source_qa_driver.change_summary: Avoids clasped/interlocked hands and asks for separated visible hands resting on a tabletop with clear finger spacing and contact shadows.
